backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining user profiles, analysis results, settings, and access-controlled endpoints for storing and retrieving trading chart analyses with blob storage and authorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that drops the legacy `geminiApiKey` field when upgrading from the old actor state to the new one.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: removal of the Gemini/external API integration from the frontend, and creation of a local client-side candle analysis engine.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, services, and context used in the React trading analysis app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Advance Signal Pro', mounting the app at `#root` and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, settings) wrapped in ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using the useCamera hook, supporting photo capture, retake, and camera switching with all UI text in Portuguese.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Renders a canvas overlay on top of a chart image, drawing resistance/support level lines and a directional trend arrow based on analysis data stored in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: Drag-and-drop and click-to-browse file upload component that validates image files (PNG, JPG, WebP, max 10MB) and rejects HEIC/HEIF formats with user-facing error messages.
Displays a single analysis history entry as a clickable card showing signal type (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA), confidence percentage, and trend direction, navigating to the results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a consistent shell including a toast notification provider and a footer with branding and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
Displays a single step in a multi-stage processing flow with visual states for pending, active (spinning loader), and complete (checkmark) stages.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: Simple presentational component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the primary trading signal card showing direction (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA), confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional strength indicator with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Empty configuration file, likely a placeholder for API configuration settings.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme management, persisting the selected theme to localStorage and applying it as a class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, exposing the captured image file and any permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, and daily operation progress/limits.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Wraps the get/update settings queries into a single convenience hook that exposes settings data, loading state, and an update function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens along with base element styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for selecting or capturing a trading chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then navigating to the processing screen.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using the useGetAnalyses hook, showing a loading state or empty-state prompt when no analyses exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Displays an animated multi-stage processing screen that loads a chart image from sessionStorage, runs local candle analysis, maps the result, and navigates to the Results page. Optionally persists the analysis to the backend via an actor mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Renders the chart analysis results page, reading analysis data from sessionStorage and displaying trend direction, candlestick patterns, signal cards, chart overlay, and share/save actions.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure AI sensitivity, default timeframe, daily operation limit, signal notifications, and light/dark theme, persisting changes via backend mutations.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/services/localCandleAnalysi: Client-side candle analysis engine that uses Canvas pixel data to detect chart regions, extract candlestick data, and compute trading signals entirely in the browser without any HTTP requests.
frontend/src/types/analysisTypes.ts: Defines the TypeScript interface for the local candle analysis result, including signal type, trend direction, confidence, probabilities, detected patterns, strength, and optional error fields.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the external chart analysis API response and API errors, documenting the expected 6-step rule-based technical analysis contract.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date-time string.
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps a local candle engine analysis result (LocalAnalysisResult) to the internal AnalysisResult format, converting signals, trends, and candlestick patterns to their corresponding enum values and generating mock resistance levels.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Provides a shareAnalysis utility that formats analysis results into a Portuguese text summary and shares it via the Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/animation utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for Advance Signal Pro describing the app's architecture, existing features, known issues, and current version (37), noting that all chart analysis is now performed locally without external API calls.
